# Supplementary material

<!-- Layout mirrors studies/resource_extraction/narrative/sections/99_appendix.Rmd.
     Tables S1-S4 are built by scripts/110_exhibit_tables.R from
     data/descriptive_exhibits.rds (written by scripts/100_exhibit_descriptive_stats.R).
     Tables S5-S7 are frontier results and still read curated CSVs in data/tables/.
     Figures come from scripts/101_exhibit_figures.R into output/figure/.
     See scripts/README.md for the naming convention. -->

## Note S1. Drivers of technical inefficiency

<!-- TODO: the v001 draft has this heading with no body text (see Table S7 for the
     underlying results). Write the note, modeled on resource_extraction's Note A1. -->

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
sec_landscape()
```

#### Table S0. Construction of the farmland tenure indicators from the GLSS Section 8b plot rosters

```{r tabS0, echo=FALSE}
ft_tableS0()
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
sec_portrait()
```

\newpage

#### Table S1. Farmland ownership status amongst Ghanaian crop farmers (2012-2017)

```{r tabS1, echo=FALSE}
ft_tableS1()
```

\newpage

#### Table S2. Farmland mode of acquisition amongst Ghanaian crop farmers (2012-2017)

```{r tabS2, echo=FALSE}
ft_tableS2()
```

\newpage

#### Table S3. Farmland ownership rights amongst Ghanaian crop farmers (2012-2017)

```{r tabS3, echo=FALSE}
ft_tableS3()
```

\newpage

#### Table S4. Farmland sharecropping agreements amongst Ghanaian crop farmers (2012-2017)

```{r tabS4, echo=FALSE}
ft_tableS4()
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
sec_portrait()
```

#### Table S5. Mean meta stochastic frontier analysis results for Ghanaian crop producers from 1991-2017

```{r tabS5, echo=FALSE}
ft_tableS5()
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
sec_landscape()
```

#### Table S6. Parity in technology level and technical efficiency by farmland ownership details in Ghana (1991-2017) - unmatched estimates

```{r tabS6, echo=FALSE}
ft_tableS6()
```

\newpage

#### Table S7. Determinants of crop production technical inefficiency and land-ownership-driven technology gaps in Ghana (1991-2017)

```{r tabS7, echo=FALSE}
ft_tableS7()
```

\newpage

#### Figure S1. Covariate balancing summary

![](../output/figure/Covariate_balance_variance.png){width=9.3in}

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
sec_landscape()
```

#### Figure S2. Alternative model specifications generally show a decreasing impact of land ownership on crop production output for Ghanaian farmers (1991-2017)

![](../output/figure/robustness.png){width=6.3in}

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
sec_portrait()
```
